plugins.name: session-summarizer
plugins.description: Session summarizer — produces a structured summary of the current session covering actions taken, decisions, open questions, and next steps

plugins.name: session-bug-hunter
plugins.description: Session-based GitHub bug reporter — detects issues throughout the session and opens GitHub issues

plugins.name: turkce-token-tasarrufu
plugins.description: Turkish token-saving hybrid mode — reduces token usage in Turkish conversations by keeping internal work in English
